name: home-display
description: Family information display for a Raspberry Pi 5 + 1080p monitor.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,admin -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix admin run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix admin run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix admin install
